Free Tools

Resources

Practical tools for perimenopause, brain fog, mood shifts, sleep disruption, and daily rhythm support.

☀️ PDF Guide

Morning Ritual Guide

A printable guide to building a steady morning practice that supports calm, focus, and nervous system relief.

Open Guide
🧠 Worksheet

Midlife Brain Fog Checklist

A simple checklist to help you notice focus issues, memory slips, overwhelm, and patterns worth tracking.

✎ Assessment

Doctor Prep Questions for Perimenopause

A clear question sheet for appointments about symptoms, cycle changes, sleep issues, mood shifts, and treatment options.

🌿 Audio

Sleep Reset Audio

A short guided audio for women who need help winding down after restless, overstimulated days.

❋ Checklist

Perimenopause Symptom Snapshot

A one-page tracker that helps you notice the symptoms affecting your energy, sleep, mood, and daily function.

✧ Journal

Journal Prompts for Midlife Overwhelm

Reflection prompts for women who feel unlike themselves and want language for what this season is bringing up.

What these resources focus on

Balanced Feminine Path centers perimenopause with extra attention on brain fog, focus struggles, mood shifts, overwhelm, sleep trouble, and the symptom patterns that can make midlife feel confusing.

New in the shop

Need deeper support than a free download?

Explore the digital product collection for perimenopause support, sleep help, brain fog tools, morning reset work, and midlife planning.

Visit the Shop

Looking for Something Specific?

Have a topic you'd like to see covered? A resource you wish existed? Let us know—we'd love to hear from you.
